nasb.text: I will overthrow the thrones of kingdoms and destroy the power of the kingdoms of the nations; and I will overthrow the chariots and their riders, and the horses and their riders will go down, everyone by the sword of another.’

esv.text: and to overthrow the throne of kingdoms. I am about to destroy the strength of the kingdoms of the nations, and overthrow the chariots and their riders. And the horses and their riders shall go down, every one by the sword of his brother.

cnv.text: 我必傾覆列國的寶座，消滅外族萬國的勢力，我必推翻戰車和駕車的人；馬匹和騎馬的都必跌倒；各人必死在自己兄弟的刀下。’

ccb.text: 推翻君王的宝座，消灭列国的势力，掀翻他们的战车和驾车的人，使战马跌倒、骑士自相残杀。
